metadata.description: A provably read-only SQL layer for AI agents over the database behind an ERP - statement-checking guard, public benchmark, in-browser playground.

plugins.name: erp-report-engine
plugins.description: The agent queries an ERP's database through canonical entities (never raw tables) behind a four-layer read-only guard that checks the statement itself - refusing the file reads, shell calls and write-escapes a shape-only check waves through. Bundles the guarded MCP server, safe-query skills, and a zero-setup trust benchmark. Profiles: Logo Tiger, Netsis, Mikro.
